display.purpose: Primary page idea and major section headlines.

label.purpose: Short labels, metadata, buttons, counts, and framework tags.

shadows.name: soft-separation
shadows.purpose: Compact forms and surfaces needing separation from paper.

shadows.name: focused-surface
shadows.purpose: One important instrument, result, or conversion surface.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Button, border, and compact selection feedback.

motion.name: panel-enter
motion.purpose: Detail panels and purposeful screen-level transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The dominant action on a page.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background:#1B1813; color:#FFFDF8; border:1px solid #1B1813; border-radius:4px; padding:12px 18px; font:500 13px/1.2 'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; letter-spacing:.04em; cursor:pointer; transition:background 140ms ease-out,transform 140ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:#000; transform:translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:3px solid #E8752B; outline-offset:4px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background:#FFFDF8; color:#1B1813; border:1px solid #D2C9B5; border-radius:4px; padding:11px 17px; font:500 13px/1.2 'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; letter-spacing:.04em; cursor:pointer; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color:#1B1813; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline:3px solid #E8752B; outline-offset:4px; }

components.name: Input Field
components.css: .ds-field { display:grid; gap:7px; color:#1B1813; font:500 11px/1.2 'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; letter-spacing:.08em; } .ds-input { background:#FFFDF8; color:#1B1813; border:1px solid #D2C9B5; border-radius:7px; padding:12px 14px; font:400 16px/1.5 Archivo,system-ui,sans-serif; } .ds-input:focus { border-color:#3B6E8F; outline:3px solid rgba(59,110,143,.2); outline-offset:1px; }

components.name: Reading Card
components.description: A flat repeated surface for articles, use cases, and explanations.
components.html:
A practical first move

Start with the work that is already leaking time, deals, or cash.
components.css: .ds-reading-card { background:#FFFDF8; color:#1B1813; border:1px solid #D2C9B5; border-radius:7px; padding:20px; max-width:420px; } .ds-reading-card h3 { margin:0 0 8px; font:500 24px/1.12 Newsreader,Georgia,serif; letter-spacing:-.02em; } .ds-reading-card p { margin:0; color:#5A5347; font:400 16px/1.5 Archivo,system-ui,sans-serif; } .ds-reading-card:hover { border-color:#1B1813; }

components.name: Semantic Axis Chip
components.description: Meaning-bearing state for a business axis; never decorative.
components.css: .ds-axis-chip { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; background:#DFEAF1; color:#3B6E8F; border:1px solid #3B6E8F; border-radius:4px; padding:5px 8px; font:600 11px/1.2 'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; letter-spacing:.08em; }

narrative.overview: One practical visual system for reading, interactive tools, and funnels. Paper and ink establish trust; semantic colors communicate business axes, dispositions, status, and outcomes.
keyCharacteristics: Warm paper and near-black ink foundation
Real evidence over decorative AI imagery

rules.name: Meaning Before Decoration
rules.body: Every saturated color must communicate axis, disposition, status, or outcome.

rules.name: Three Voices
rules.body: Newsreader speaks authority, Archivo explains, and IBM Plex Mono classifies short data.

rules.name: Flat by Default
rules.body: Repeated reading surfaces use borders without decorative shadows.

dos: Lead with the business leak and one useful next action.
Use the shared paper, surface, and ink foundation across every route.
Use real screenshots, tools, demonstrations, and event photography as evidence.
donts: Do not force a new page to choose between Field Manual and Expressive registers.
Do not use generic blue-gradient SaaS styling or dark hacker-terminal decoration.
Do not use saturated color without a named semantic meaning.
